content_of_post_to_comment:
I'm 28 years old.

I hated many people for almost my entire life. I hated myself since I was 12 to 23.

I had severe depression since I was 12.

I had severe mental illness OCD, fear, worry, paranoia, anxiety, depression, 2016 to June 2021.

July 10, 2026 I finally decided to change myself for the better.

I love myself. I want to live. I want to make my mother happy.

Despite my many problems, I have a happy good life right now.

I know I can do it.

I know I can continue to improve and change for the better.

To all the people struggling. I know you can change for the better.

I recently decided to change for the better.

I'm 28.

God changed me for the better.

I don't think.

I know without a doubt you can change for the better.

You have to start right now.
